public_reputation: Hammer-line marshal who drills mixed labor crews to fight in disciplined blocks when frontier predators breach the route towers.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Projects readiness without theatricality, as if discipline matters more than spectacle. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a warrior still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of warrior in and around Titan Towers, Soreheim, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Titan Towers, Soreheim workable through the obligations of warrior while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must prepare for violence without letting the surrounding institution look openly unstable. Around Titan Towers, Soreheim, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of warrior visibly slip.

Brakka Stonewake will trade useful tactical knowledge if the party solves a security problem too sensitive for ordinary channels.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
